member.name: T:AutoGroupGenerator.Subgraph
member.summary: Represents a subset of a larger instance.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.Subgraph.Nodes
member.summary: Nodes contained in this subgraph.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.Subgraph.Sources
member.summary: Source nodes that lead into this subgraph.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.Subgraph.HashOfSources
member.summary: Hash representing the sources set.

member.name: T:AutoGroupGenerator.InputAssetsCommandQueue
member.summary: Command queue that aggregates input assets from configured rules.

member.name: T:AutoGroupGenerator.AddressableCleanupCommandQueue
member.summary: Command queue that synchronizes Addressables data with AutoGroupGenerator definitions.

member.name: T:AutoGroupGenerator.DependencyGraphCommandQueue
member.summary: Command queue that generates the dependency graph of project assets.

member.name: T:AutoGroupGenerator.SuperNode
member.summary:
Represents a strongly connected component (SCC) in the AutoGroupGenerator asset dependency graph.
A SuperNode is an abstraction that groups together asset nodes which are mutually dependent on each other, forming a dependency cycle. In graph terms, a set of nodes is considered strongly connected if every node in the set can be reached from every other node by following dependency edges.
SuperNodes are used internally by AutoGroupGenerator to resolve cyclic dependencies by collapsing such cycles into a single logical node during graph analysis. This allows the system to reason about dependencies, ordering, and grouping in a deterministic way without being blocked by dependency loops.
SuperNodes are not user-facing and are not intended to be created or manipulated directly. They exist solely as an implementation detail of AutoGroupGenerator’s graph processing pipeline and are handled automatically by the system.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.SuperNode.FromSingle(AutoGroupGenerator.AssetNode)
member.summary: Creates a containing a single asset node.
member.param: The asset node that will be the only member of the super node.
member.returns: A super node containing the provided node as its sole entry.

member.name: P:AutoGroupGenerator.SuperNode.Nodes
member.summary: Gets the asset nodes contained in this super node.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.SuperNode.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{AutoGroupGenerator.AssetNode})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The asset nodes to include in the strongly connected component.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.SuperNode.Equals(AutoGroupGenerator.SuperNode)
member.summary: Determines whether another super node has the same member nodes.
member.returns: True when both super nodes contain the same nodes.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.SuperNode.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether another object is equal to this super node.
member.returns: True when the object is an equal .

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.SuperNode.GetHashCode
member.summary: Returns a hash code for this super node.
member.returns: The hash code.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.SuperNode.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the super node.
member.returns: A human-readable string of contained nodes.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.SuperNode.Contains(AutoGroupGenerator.AssetNode)
member.summary: Determines whether the super node contains the specified asset node.
member.param: The asset node to look for within the super node membership.
member.returns: True when the node is present in the super node collection.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.AssetDatabaseUtil.FindAssetGuidsForType``1
member.summary: Finds asset GUIDs for assets of the specified type.

member.summary: Determines whether a subgraph forms a hierarchy rooted at its sources.
member.param: The subgraph instance to evaluate for hierarchical structure.

member.returns: True when the subgraph is hierarchical.

member.summary: Initializes an empty graph.

member.summary: Adds an edge between two nodes, adding missing nodes as needed.

member.summary: Adds a node to the graph if it does not already exist.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.Graph`1.GetNeighbors(`0)
member.summary: Gets the neighbors for the specified node.
member.returns: A list of neighboring nodes.

member.summary: Gets all nodes in the graph.
member.returns: A list of all nodes.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.Graph`1.GetTransposedGraph
member.summary: Builds the transposed graph with all edges reversed.
member.returns: The transposed graph.

member.summary: Serializes the graph into a data transfer object.
member.returns: The serializable data.

member.summary: Rehydrates a graph from serialized data.
member.returns: The reconstructed graph.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.Graph`1.FindLeafNodes(`0)
member.summary: Finds all leaf nodes reachable from the given node.
member.returns: The set of reachable leaf nodes.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.Graph`1.FindPathConeToLeaves(`0)
member.summary: Finds every node along paths from the starting node to leaves.
member.returns: All nodes encountered along paths to leaves.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.Graph`1.FindPathAndLeaves(`0,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{`0}@,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{`0}@)
member.summary: Finds nodes along paths from the starting node and the leaf nodes reached.
member.param: Outputs the nodes along the traversed paths.
Outputs the leaf nodes that were reached.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.Graph`1.FindAllPathsToLeafNodes(`0)
member.summary: Finds all paths from the start node to any leaf node.
member.returns: A list of paths, where each path is a list of nodes.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.Graph`1.DepthFirstSearch(`0,System.Action{`0})
member.summary: Performs a depth-first traversal starting at the given node.
member.param: Callback invoked when a node is visited.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.Graph`1.DepthFirstSearchIterative(`0,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{`0},System.Action{`0})
member.summary: Performs a depth-first traversal with a provided visited set.
member.param: Callback invoked when a node is visited.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.Graph`1.DepthFirstSearchForAllPaths(`0,`0)
member.summary: Finds all paths between a start and end node using DFS.
member.returns: A list of paths between the nodes.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.Graph`1.DepthFirstSearchForAllPaths(`0,System.Predicate{`0})
member.summary: Finds all paths from a start node to nodes matching a condition.
member.returns: A list of matching paths.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.Graph`1.BreadthFirstSearch(`0,System.Action{`0})
member.summary: Performs a breadth-first traversal starting at the given node.
member.param: Callback invoked when a node is visited.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.Graph`1.ConvertNodeType``1(System.Func{`0,``0})
member.summary: Converts the graph to use a different node type.
member.param: Converter from the source node type to the destination type.
member.returns: A graph with converted node values.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.Graph`1.GetSubgraph(System.Collections.Generic.List{`0})
member.summary: Creates a subgraph containing only the specified nodes.
member.param: Nodes to include in the subgraph.
member.returns: The resulting subgraph.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.Graph`1.ToUndirected(AutoGroupGenerator.Graph{`0})
member.summary: Converts a directed graph into an undirected graph by mirroring edges.
member.returns: An undirected graph.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.Graph`1.RemoveNodeFromUndirectedGraph(AutoGroupGenerator.Graph{`0},`0)
member.summary: Removes a node and its edges from an undirected graph.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.Graph`1.GetConnectedComponentsOfUndirectedGraph(AutoGroupGenerator.Graph{`0})
member.summary: Returns the connected components of an undirected graph.
member.returns: A list of connected components.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.Graph`1.CollapseToSCCs
member.summary: Collapses strongly connected components into a DAG of instances.
member.returns: A graph whose nodes represent strongly connected components.

member.name: T:AutoGroupGenerator.Command
member.summary: Describes an action queued for execution.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.Command.Action
member.summary: Action to invoke when the command is executed.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.Command.Info
member.summary: Human-readable description of the command.

member.name: T:AutoGroupGenerator.LastProcessingStep
member.summary: Identifies the last processing step to execute.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.LastProcessingStep.None
member.summary: No processing steps are executed.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.LastProcessingStep.InputAssets
member.summary: Stops after collecting input assets.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.LastProcessingStep.GenerateDependencyGraph
member.summary: Stops after generating the dependency graph.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.LastProcessingStep.GenerateSubGraphs
member.summary: Stops after identifying subgraphs and their source relationships.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.LastProcessingStep.GenerateGroupLayout
member.summary: Stops after generating group layouts.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.LastProcessingStep.GenerateAddressableGroups
member.summary: Stops after creating addressable groups.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.LastProcessingStep.Cleanup
member.summary: Stops after cleanup operations that refine addressable output.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.LastProcessingStep.All
member.summary: Executes all steps in the pipeline.

member.name: T:AutoGroupGenerator.ProcessStepReport
member.summary: Flags controlling which processing steps emit reports.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.ProcessStepReport.InputAssets
member.summary: Write a report for the input assets step.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.ProcessStepReport.DependencyGraph
member.summary: Write a report for the dependency graph step.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.ProcessStepReport.SubGraphs
member.summary: Write a report for the subgraph step.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.ProcessStepReport.GroupLayout
member.summary: Write a report for the group layout step.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.ProcessStepReport.AddressableGroups
member.summary: Write a report for the addressable groups step.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.ProcessStepReport.Cleanup
member.summary: Write a report for cleanup operations.

member.name: T:AutoGroupGenerator.LogLevelID
member.summary: Defines verbosity levels for logging output.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.LogLevelID.OnlyErrors
member.summary: Log only errors to reduce output during batch runs.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.LogLevelID.Info
member.summary: Log informational messages for normal pipeline monitoring.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.LogLevelID.Developer
member.summary: Log developer-focused diagnostics.

member.name: T:AutoGroupGenerator.AutoGroupGeneratorSettings
member.summary: ScriptableObject containing configuration for the AutoGroupGenerator workflows.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.AutoGroupGeneratorSettings.InputRules
member.summary: Input rules used to select assets to process.

member.name: F:AutoGroupGenerator.AutoGroupGeneratorSettings.OutputRules
member.summary: Output rules used to post-process generated layouts.

member.name: P:AutoGroupGenerator.AutoGroupGeneratorSettings.LastProcessingStep
member.summary: Gets the last processing step to execute.

member.name: P:AutoGroupGenerator.AutoGroupGeneratorSettings.LogLevel
member.summary: Gets the configured logging verbosity.

member.name: P:AutoGroupGenerator.AutoGroupGeneratorSettings.SaveGraphOnDisk
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether to persist the dependency graph to disk.

member.name: P:AutoGroupGenerator.AutoGroupGeneratorSettings.RemoveEmptyGroups
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether to remove empty addressable groups.

member.name: P:AutoGroupGenerator.AutoGroupGeneratorSettings.RemoveUnnecessaryEntries
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether to remove Addressable entries that are no longer needed.

member.name: P:AutoGroupGenerator.AutoGroupGeneratorSettings.RemoveAddressableScenesFromBuildProfile
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether to remove Addressable scenes from the build profile.

member.name: P:AutoGroupGenerator.AutoGroupGeneratorSettings.SortAddressableGroups
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether addressable groups should be sorted.

member.name: P:AutoGroupGenerator.AutoGroupGeneratorSettings.ScanForUnsupportedFiles
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether to scan assets for unsupported file types.

member.name: P:AutoGroupGenerator.AutoGroupGeneratorSettings.ProcessReport
member.summary: Gets the report flags for processing steps.

member.name: M:AutoGroupGenerator.AutoGroupGeneratorSettings.Validate
member.summary: Validates the current settings configuration.

member.name: T:AutoGroupGenerator.GroupLayoutCommandQueue
member.summary: Command queue that creates group layout definitions from subgraphs.

member.name: T:AutoGroupGenerator.Constants
member.summary: Centralized constants shared across the editor tooling.

member.name: T:AutoGroupGenerator.Constants.Menus
member.summary: Menu definitions for the editor UI.

member.name: T:AutoGroupGenerator.Constants.ContextMenus
member.summary: Context menu definitions for asset creation.

member.name: T:AutoGroupGenerator.Constants.FilePaths
member.summary: Paths used for report persistence.
